posting.sourceTitle: Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers JAC Local Union 1
posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers Local Union #1
posting.locationSummary: Long Island City, NY; job sites include New York City and Long Island
posting.applicationSummary: Apply online during the scheduled application dates, print the application and affidavits, and mail the completed packet with proof of high school completion to the International Masonry Institute.
posting.applicationMailingAddress: International Masonry Institute, 12-07 44th Avenue, Long Island City, NY 11101
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED, and must submit proof with the complete application.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to job sites, including throughout New York City and Long Island.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must take and pass a drug test, at the sponsor's expense, after selection and before enrollment.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED and submit proof with the complete application.
Must provide DD-214 (Certificate of Release or Discharge from Active Duty), if applicable, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must pass the JATC Basic Assessment Skills Exam, a reading and math comprehension exam, and score at least 23 out of 28 to be considered for an interview.
Must have reliable means of transportation to job sites, including all of New York City and Long Island.
Must take and pass a drug test, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must sign an affidavit stating that they are physically capable of performing the essential functions of the apprenticeship without posing a threat to the health or safety of others.
Work may include hand tools and power tools.
Work may include exposure to loud noise, hazardous machinery, hazardous voltages, and respiratory irritants.
Work may include prolonged standing, climbing, walking, repeated squatting, stretching, and bending.
Work may include working indoors and outdoors in extreme temperatures and weather conditions.
Work may include working in confined areas where movement is greatly limited.
Work may include lifting and moving heavy supplies and equipment weighing up to 100 pounds.
Work may include working from ladders, scaffolds, and personnel lifts.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be 18 or older, have a high school diploma or equivalency, pass a basic skills exam, have reliable transportation, pass a drug test, and be physically able to do the work.
posting.contactSummary: Contact Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers Local Union #1 at (718) 706-9294 for further information.
